description: Connect LaunchDarkly to sync feature flags, projects, environments, members, and audit log entries for feature flag intelligence.

install_fields.label: API Key
install_fields.help: Found in LaunchDarkly → Account Settings → Authorization → Personal access tokens

methods.name: install
methods.description: Validate API key via GET /projects and record connector as installed

methods.name: health_check
methods.description: Verify API key is still valid via GET /projects

methods.name: sync
methods.description: Sync projects, feature flags, environments, members, and audit log to knowledge base

methods.name: list_flags
methods.description: List all feature flags in a project with pagination

methods.name: get_flag
methods.description: Get a single feature flag by project key and flag key

methods.name: list_environments
methods.description: List all environments in a project

methods.name: list_members
methods.description: List all account members with pagination

methods.name: list_audit_log
methods.description: List audit log entries with cursor-based pagination
